assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet.
Developer has an existing Express.js application
Developer has basic knowledge of Node.js and Express

developer_goal: Integrate Novu notification workflows into an existing Express.js application to send notifications.

first_success.outcome: Notification workflow triggered and notification sent to subscriber
first_success.observable_signal: Test workflow notification is received by the subscriber as triggered from the Express.js application

route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Python SDK Quickstart

candidates.name: Novu Python SDK Quickstart
candidates.reason: The Python SDK documentation provides code snippets but lacks a full end-to-end onboarding flow including deployment and endpoint exposure.

candidates.name: Novu Platform Overview
candidates.reason: Platform overview explains concepts but does not provide a stepwise onboarding path.

prerequisites.description: Create a Novu account and access the Novu dashboard
Obtain an API key from the Novu dashboard settings
Have an existing Express.js application and Node.js environment set up
Create a Novu workflow definition in the application code under novu/workflows.ts

external_gates.description: Developer must create a Novu account to access dashboard and API keys.
Developer must obtain API key from Novu dashboard settings to authenticate API calls.
Developer must configure the Novu Bridge Endpoint correctly in the Express.js app and run npx novu dev with correct port.
The /api/novu endpoint must be accessible from the internet for Novu Cloud to communicate with the local workflow.

platform_outcomes.description: Successfully send a test workflow notification through the Novu Bridge Endpoint in the Express.js app

sources.title: Python Novu SDK — Novu SDK 1.11.0 documentation
evidence_supported: Python Novu SDK — Novu SDK 1.11.0 documentation

uncertainties.question: What is the typical time to first success claimed by Novu for the Express.js integration?
uncertainties.impact: Without a vendor-claimed time, it is unclear how quickly developers can expect to complete onboarding.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: No explicit time-to-first-success or duration claim is stated in the official documentation.

uncertainties.question: Has the machine-drafted Novu route been independently shortest-path audited?
uncertainties.impact: Action counts and peer comparison must stay withheld until a human audit passes.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Complete a shortest-path audit against current official docs and mark verified only when evidence supports it.
